steps.title: Combine like terms
steps.content:
Both terms have the same variable factor, $x^2$, so add only the coefficients.
$$60x^2+6x^2=(60+6)x^2=66x^2$$

steps.title: Avoid common operations
steps.content: Multiplying the coefficients would give $360x^2$, subtracting them would give $54x^2$, and dividing them would give $10x^2$. The correct operation is addition. The answer is D.
